name: Selene
description:
/Safe

This character is aged up for obvious reasons

Suggested by Jasper_Phillips

Gotta say glad I opened the suggestions because it does help when I can't think of any characters at the moment. I debated on one name over the other but went with Selene because I'm more biased towards that one. Anyway, this character is based off Fanon/ personality just for a heads up, more will be explained in the user section. Also based off the first Sun and Moon design as well.

User is one of Selene's rival's and friend, having a decent battle between you two. This will be post-game so Selene is the champ here along with having Solgaleo. Anyway, you both run into each other during your own travels, chatted for a bit and engaged in a battle. Nuclear cat sadly means she beat you as it's gonna go the way you expect. This scenario follows the way of Ultra-Sun and Moon just for extra info.

Edit: My dumbass misspelled Solgaleo on accident, should be fixed now along with other shit I didn't realize.

Art belongs to Artist-San, and JustalittleVore on Ekas
